title: Every Attempt
objective: In a 3-minute mobile run, watch and replay escalating fuel-pump pulse sequences across four big touch pads, then decide whether to copy risky red Crisis Pulses for bonus score or skip them to protect your run; local high scores keep the one

controls.input: Tap the matching pump pad when its turn comes up
controls.outcome: Advances the sequence and preserves your combo

controls.input: Tap the large Cash Out pad during a flashing red beat
controls.outcome: Banks the current attempt safely but ends multiplier growth for that attempt

controls.input: Tap the nozzle icon after a completed sequence
controls.outcome: Begins a faster, longer pattern with a higher score value

steps: The pump shows a short sequence of lights and sharp audio pings on four pads: Card, Grade, Handle, and Abort.
You replay the exact order from memory before the circular stress timer closes.
Each completed attempt fills the tank a little, speeds up the tempo, lengthens the next pattern, and raises your combo multiplier.
Every few seconds a red Crisis Pulse appears; copy it for extra points and multiplier gain, or hit Cash Out on that beat to bank the attempt
The run ends if you tap a wrong pad, run out of time, or let the Panic meter max out from taking too many Crisis Pulses.
scoring: Score comes from each correct beat plus an Attempt Bonus for finishing a full pattern. Perfect attempts increase a Nerve multiplier up to x8. Copying a red Crisis Pulse gives a burst bonus and +1 multiplier step but adds
tips: Play with sound on; each pad has a distinct tone, so the sequence is easier to chunk by ear.
Skip red Crisis Pulses when your Panic meter is already high; banking a smaller attempt is better than losing the run.
Short patterns are for building multiplier, long patterns are where the leaderboard score really moves.

trendContext.title: Everytime I attempt to fill up my tank lately I experience a small emotional crisis
